package rulecoverage

func NegativeFmtSprintfHexToString() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_sprintf_hex_to_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%x\", ...)` instead of a direct hex formatter when only the string is needed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
